name: ACM Research, Inc.
business: ACM Research supplies advanced capital equipment for the global semiconductor industry, including wet-cleaning, plating, furnace, PECVD, track, and advanced packaging tools. The company sells primarily to foundry/logic and memory chip manufacturers, with the majority of revenue from customers in Asia, especially mainland China.

exposures.sentence: We supply advanced, innovative capital equipment developed for the global semiconductor industry.
We also develop, manufacture and sell a range of advanced packaging equipment to wafer assembly and packaging customers.

tamClaims.claim: Our current product portfolio addresses approximately $21 billion of the 2025 global wafer fab equipment, or WFE, market.
tamClaims.sentence: We estimate, based on third-party reports and on customer and other information, that our current product portfolio addresses approximately $21 billion of the 2025 global wafer fab equipment, or WFE, market.

tamClaims.claim: By product line: wafer cleaning $7.3B, PECVD $5.3B, Track $3.0B, furnace $2.6B, ECP $1.5B, stress-free polishing/advanced packaging/wafer processing/other >$1.2B.
tamClaims.sentence: By product line, we estimate an approximately $7.3 billion market opportunity is addressed by our wafer cleaning equipment, $5.3 billion by our Plasma-Enhanced Chemical Vapor Deposition, or PECVD, equipment, $3.0 billion by our Track equipment, $2.6 billion by our furnace equipment, $1.5 billion by our electro-chemical plating, or ECP, equipment, and more than $1.2 billion by our stress-free polishing, advanced packaging, wafer processing, and other processing equipment.

tamClaims.claim: Gartner estimates total worldwide semiconductor WFE market $111.6B in 2024, $123.9B in 2025, $138.5B in 2026.
tamClaims.sentence: Gartner estimates the total worldwide semiconductor WFE market grew by 11.0% from $111.6 billion in 2024 to $123.9 billion in 2025, and estimates will increase by 11.8% to $138.5 billion in 2026.

tamClaims.claim: Gartner estimates China WFE $40.0B in 2024, $39.3B in 2025, $35.4B in 2026.
tamClaims.sentence: Gartner estimates China WFE decreased by 1.7%, from $40.0 billion in 2024 to $39.3 billion in 2025, and is expected to decrease by 9.9% to $35.4 billion in 2026.
